## ExchangeFullSetParams type

Params needed to exhange(buy or sell) a full set of assets for a pool.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type ExchangeFullSetParams = {
    marketId: number | u128;
    amount: number;
    signer: KeyringPairOrExtSigner;
};
```
